_comment: Content blueprint for the LISRAYA email

content_blueprint.headline: You deserve more.
content_blueprint.rationale: Lead with the approval news + emotional hook
content_blueprint.copy_outline: Big news for the dermatomyositis community: Lisraya® (brepocitinib) is now FDA-approved — the first targeted treatment for adults living with dermatomyositis.
content_blueprint.design_concept: Bright, buoyant hero with lifestyle photo, brand blue headline, fluid wave accents
content_blueprint.clinical_fact_covered: First FDA-approved targeted treatment for adult dermatomyositis

content_blueprint.headline: A new option, made just for DM
content_blueprint.rationale: Translate the approval into what it means for patients
content_blueprint.copy_outline:
Lisraya is a once-daily pill that blocks specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis. For adults living with DM, that can mean:

• Increased muscle strength
• Less reliance on steroids
• Improved skin symptoms, including itch
• More of the activities you love
content_blueprint.design_concept: Clean bulleted callout panel with brand blue check accents, warm and approachable
content_blueprint.clinical_fact_covered: Once-daily oral; muscle strength, steroid-sparing, skin symptom benefits

content_blueprint.headline: Talk to your doctor about Lisraya
content_blueprint.copy_outline: Wondering if Lisraya could be right for you? Start the conversation with your doctor today. → Button: "Learn More About Lisraya"
content_blueprint.design_concept: Bold brand-blue CTA button, confident and inviting close
content_blueprint.section_summary: Primary CTA to start the conversation
